title: dubautia × media
intro: Dubautia × media, also known as Ma'o hau hele, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to the Hawaiian Islands. The plant's medicinal properties make it a valuable resource in traditional Hawaiian medicine, as it contains flavonoids, saponins, and sesquiterpenes, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Dubautia × media include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even exhibit anticancer properties, making it a promising candidate for further research. Dubautia × media can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from skin irritations to internal infections.
